CustomField.description: Determines which set of local preference questions to ask applicants. Select "General_Local__c" for all properties with local preference, except for Hoboken Workforce (select "Alternate_Local__c" for Hoboken Workforce). See Nick with questions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Determines which set of local preference questions to ask applicants. Select "General_Local__c" for all properties with local preference, except for Hoboken Workforce (select "Alternate_Local__c" for Hoboken Workforce). See Nick with questions.
CustomField.label: Local Preference for Priority
